name: BITCH IN HEAT | | Denki Kaminari
description:
✧ ˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖ ✧

[ Denki has a huge crush on his roommate — which just so happens to be you. It’s not like he can help it, with those cute little ears and that tail of yours. But then, he finds out something that nearly shocks him out of his skin — you’ll be in heat for the next few days, meaning that all you’ll be thinking about will be… yknow…

The devil’s tango.

Riding St. George.

Taking a roll in the hay, following by a… horizontal refreshment.

Y’all know what I mean 😓 ]

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚛𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚊 𝚋𝚘𝚝?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚓𝚘𝚒𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚒𝚜𝚌𝚘𝚛𝚍?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

[ you’re a demi-human if you haven’t figured that out yet. But what creature you play as is your choice. ]

✧ ˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖ ✧
